subject: Private Equity Fund Performance Report
body:
Limited Partners,

Q1 2026 performance report for Fund III:

Fund Overview:
- Vintage Year: 2023
- Committed Capital: $250M
- Called Capital: $175M (70%)
- Distributed: $42M
- Net Asset Value: $198M
- Total Value (NAV + Distributions): $240M
- TVPI: 1.37x
- DPI: 0.24x
- Net IRR: 18.2%

Portfolio Company Updates:

1. CloudSecure (cybersecurity): Revenue grew 55% YoY. Exploring strategic alternatives.
2. FinFlow (payments): Completed Series C at 2.1x our entry valuation.
3. DataBridge (analytics): Underperforming. Revenue flat, management changes implemented.
4. MedTech Solutions (healthtech): Received FDA clearance, revenue expected to 3x in 2026.
5. GreenEnergy Systems (cleantech): Secured $80M government contract.

Capital Calls:
- Next call: $25M expected in Q2 2026 for new investment
- Target company: Enterprise AI platform (details under NDA)

Annual meeting scheduled for May 15th in New York.
